case_title: SIFALINE JUMA MFINANGA VS. MANUBHAIT PATEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PLAINTIFF'S UPDATED ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, MANUBHAIT PATEL, MANJUBEN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED SEP-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, MANJUBEN M

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SIFALINE MFINANGA IS PRESENT. PRESENT ON DEFENDANTS BEHALF IS DEVENDRA PATEL, MANAGER AND SON OF THE NAMED DEFENDANTS. MR. PATEL INFORMS THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT MANUBHAIT PATEL IS DECEASED AND THAT MANJUBEN PATEL IS ELDERLY AND UNABLE TO ATTEND COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-26-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-22-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, MANJUBEN M THE CLAIM AGAINST MANUBHAIT PATEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS HE IS DECEASED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF DECLARATION OF MAILING ATTACHED. FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED SEP-11-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, MANUBHAIT
